steps.title: Calculate the y-intercept
steps.content:
The y-intercept occurs at $x = 0$. Since $x$ represents months after the end of April 2015, $x = 0$ corresponds to the end of April 2015. Substitute $x = 0$ into the equation:
$$y = -\frac{1}{5}(0)^2 + 3(0) + 31 = 31$$

steps.title: Interpret the y-intercept
steps.content: The y-intercept is 31, which represents the estimated number of scheduled deliveries at the end of April 2015. That matches Choice B — At the end of April $2015$, the estimated number of scheduled deliveries was $31$..
